description: Get ready for the new academic year with our vibrant, child-friendly email template designed to promote your back to school sales event. This template is perfect for showcasing discounted stationery and educational supplies, making it a must-have for businesses targeting parents and children. The design embodies a bright and colourful aesthetic, appealing to the young audience and capturing the excitement of education. With this email template, you can effortlessly announce your flash sale, ensuring your customers are well-prepared for the upcoming school season. It's a fantastic tool for creating buzz and driving sales in the education sector, seasonal promotions, and back to school events.
short_description: Boost your back to school sales with our vibrant, child-friendly email template. Perfect for showcasing discounts on stationery and educational supplies, it captures the excitement of education with a bright and colourful design. Ideal for seasonal promotions in the education sector.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
